mapper.select: SELECT ar.alarm_rule_id AS alarmRuleId, ar.instance_id AS instanceId, ar.database_id AS databaseId, COALESCE(i.instance_name, 'Unknown') AS instanceName, COALESCE(d.database_name, 'Unknown') AS databaseName, ar.metric_type AS metricType, ar.aggregation_type AS aggregationType, ar.operator, ar.levels::text AS levels, ar.created_at AS createdAt, ar.updated_at AS updatedAt, COALESCE(ar.enabled, false) AS enabled FROM alarm_rules ar LEFT JOIN ( SELECT instance_id, instance_name FROM monitor_instance ) i ON ar.instance_id = i.instance_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT database_id, database_name FROM monitor_database ) d ON ar.database_id = d.database_id WHERE ar.alarm_rule_id = #{alarmRuleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alarm_rules( instance_id, database_id, metric_type, aggregation_type, operator, enabled, levels, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{databaseId}, #{metricType}, #{aggregationType}, COALESCE(#{operator},'gt'), COALESCE(#{enabled}, true), CAST(#{levels} AS JSONB), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE alarm_rules SET levels = CAST(#{levels} AS JSONB), aggregation_type = #{aggregationType}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE alarm_rule_id = #{alarmRuleId}
UPDATE alarm_rules SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE alarm_rule_id = #{alarmRuleId}
